title: Graph Algorithm Visualizer
description: An interactive, high-fidelity playground to construct topological graphs and visualize core graph algorithms. Create nodes by double-clicking and connect them with weighted edges, then animate step-by-step runs of Breadth-First Search (BFS), Depth-First Search (DFS), Dijkstra's Shortest Path, and Prim's Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) with synchronized pseudocode tracking, detailed execution logs, and an live adjacency matrix view.
